title: #213: AI Answers - What AI Should Never Do, Enterprise Scaling, Governing AI & Navigating IT Roadblocks
description:
Leadership wants AI everywhere. IT security can't keep up. Marketing is racing ahead while legal and finance dig in. And every week brings another story of an AI agent doing something nobody told it to do. Paul Roetzer and Cathy McPhillips answer 15 listener questions on how to actually move organizations forward and where the real opportunities lie for individuals, SMBs, and enterprises right now.

00:00:00 — Intro

00:07:01 — How do you move a company out of AI policy paralysis?

00:08:54 — How should regulated, hands-on teams introduce AI?

00:12:30 — When companies are stuck, what tends to get them moving?

00:15:00 — Should IT security evolve to adopt AI quicker or should businesses slow down?

00:17:43 — What changes an AI-skeptic employee's mind?

00:21:18 — How should early-career professionals prioritize what to learn?

00:23:29 — Is there a point where you should stop learning and start building?

00:27:29 — Where do companies get stuck scaling AI across departments?

00:29:4

title: SoftBank says it will invest up to €75 billion to build French data centers
description: The goal, the firm said, is to develop and operate up to 5 gigawatts of additional data center capacity.

title: ‘What a joke’: Github Copilot’s new token-based billing spurs consternation among devs
description: The golden age of Microsoft's Github Copilot appears to be at an end.

title: Meta is reportedly developing an AI pendant
description: Meta seems to be making big bets on AI-powered hardware.

title: I put Google’s 24/7 AI assistant Gemini Spark to work, and it’s actually pretty useful
description: Gemini Spark helps automate everyday tasks, from inbox summaries to local event planning, but it’s unclear why Google made it a separate product.

title: As the browser wars heat up, here are the hottest alternatives to Chrome and Safari in 2026
description: We’ve compiled an overview of some of the top alternative browsers available today aiming to challenge Chrome and Safari.

title: Fashion misses at Old Navy spell trouble for Gap Inc.
description: Internal flubs, not customer malaise, were the cause and have been addressed, Gap Inc. CEO Richard Dickson said Thursday. But is competition from off price a growing problem for the value brand?

title: Consumer sentiment falls to new low; cost of living ‘first-order’ worry
description: A sustained rise in long-run inflation expectations would likely increase the odds that the Federal Reserve will raise interest rates.

title: Destination XL rejects $46M go-private offer
description: The 82 cents-per-share offer does not reflect the company’s value and is “highly conditional and opportunistic,” Board Chairman Lionel Conacher said.

title: How the Pope’s Magnifica Humanitas offers a template for individuals to meet the AI moment
description: Pope Leo XIV’s new encyclical on artificial intelligence includes a statement that warrants serious attention from technologists and policymakers: “Technology is never neutral.” Magnifica Humanitas (“Magnificent Humanity”) is a clarion call to all people to act with courage and solidarity as we enter an age already being transformed by artificial intelligence, the greatest change in…

title: Publishers quietly cut ‘six-figure’ deals via Snowflake’s AI licensing platform
description: Publishers are starting to make meaningful AI licensing deals via Snowflake's RAG pipe, with some securing several six-figure deals with financial institutions.

title: Overheard at IAB Tech Lab Summit: Tim Berners-Lee on the agentic web
description: The father of the web urges social platforms to stop building addictive products and to embrace an agentic future that values individuals over outcomes.

title: Week of May 18 Evening News Ratings: CBS News Has Double-Digit Gains in Demo
description: CBS News finished above 4 million viewers for the week.

title: Week of May 18 Cable News Ratings: Holiday Weekend Brings a Mixed Bag
description: Fox News was the only network with gains during primetime and total day.

title: Marketers on the Move: Hires and Promotions at OpenAI, CNN, Chloé and More
description: A weekly roundup of the biggest U.S. and global brand leadership appointments.
